title: decatropis paucijuga
intro: Decatropis paucijuga is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the 'Yellow Bird Tree' or 'Hinau', native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Decatropis paucijuga include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Decatropis paucijuga can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
